generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time safety assessment of system conditions"
]

instance PerformanceMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time performance evaluation of thermal regulation"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted system behavior under current operational conditions"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of anomalies indicating potential faults"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the thermal system"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal control parameters for maintaining desired temperature"
]

instance SupervisoryControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated or manual corrective actions to adjust heatbed or fan operation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data analysis for safety and performance checks",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, PerformanceMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of system behavior under current conditions for predictive analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detection of system faults based on sensor data deviations",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimation of system state using sensor data and calibration algorithms",
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of control parameters to maintain target temperature",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control for automated or manual intervention to adjust system parameters",
    DTDFVocab:provides SupervisoryControlAction
]

instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware controller for real-time system management and processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictiveService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance RabbitMQServer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server for inter-component synchronization and communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictiveService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance ScipyOptimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for optimization algorithms and model calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService, StateEstimationService
]

instance InternalTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor (0.5°C accuracy) for internal temperature monitoring via 1-Wire bus",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemp1DataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor (0.5°C accuracy) for internal temperature monitoring via 1-Wire bus",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemp2DataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor for ambient environment monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTempDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTemp1DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor1
]

instance InternalTemp2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor2
]

instance ExternalTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTempSensor
]

instance InternalTempData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature data from first DS18S20 sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemp1DataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizer
]

instance InternalTempData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature data from second DS18S20 sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemp2DataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizer
]

instance ExternalTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient temperature data for environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTempDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizer
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed component for heating content with precise temperature regulation and defined operational limits"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan component for heat distribution with precise control via low-level driver"
]

instance IncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Closed thermal environment for precise temperature regulation of an incubator system",
    base:contains HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, InternalTempSensor1, InternalTempSensor2, ExternalTempSensor
]

instance IncubatorSystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Incubator system for temperature regulation",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment IncubatorSystem
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validation compares simulated behavior with empirical data trajectories (Section 3.3). Temperature uniformity was validated through experimental testing (Section 4.1), ensuring model accuracy under operational conditions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is deployed on-premise using a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B as the hosting platform for both the controller and RabbitMQ communication server, providing local computational resources and storage. No cloud or edge deployment details are specified, and scalability is constrained by the Raspberry Pi's hardware capabilities."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Monitors assess the system's safety and operational optimality using real-time data from the Physical Twin; safety violations trigger corrective actions by human operators or algorithmic controls to adjust the Physical Twin's state."
]
